cards.title: Trump Delays AI Security Executive Order
cards.body: President Trump postponed signing an executive order requiring pre-release government security reviews of AI models. He cited dissatisfaction with the order's language.

cards.title: Spotify Launches ElevenLabs Audiobook Tool
cards.body: Spotify is releasing new audiobook creation features powered by ElevenLabs. The tool will be available later this year.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Podcast Q&A Features
cards.body: Spotify users can now generate daily or weekly briefings based on custom prompts. The feature uses AI to summarize podcast content.

cards.title: Spotify Releases NotebookLM Competitor App
cards.body: Spotify launched a new desktop research app available as a preview in 20+ markets. The app directly competes with Google's NotebookLM.

cards.title: Hark Raises $700M for Universal AI
cards.body: Hark plans to release multimodal models this summer powering a personal AI platform. Hardware devices tailored for these systems will follow.

cards.title: The Path Launches Safer AI Therapy
cards.body: The Path, founded by Tony Robbins and Calm veterans, launched an AI mental health model scoring 95 on safety benchmarks. Consumer bots top out at 65 on the same scale.

cards.title: Google Pitches AI Agent Ecosystem
cards.body: Google unveiled AI agents as a new consumer web interface at I/O 2026. The concept was promising but confusing to audiences.

cards.title: Recycling Startups Use AI for Minerals
cards.body: AI-powered recycling startups are targeting critical mineral recovery as aluminum prices surge 20%. The sector aims to become a major metal source.

cards.title: Jensen Huang Eyes $200B AI CPU Market
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang identified CPUs for AI agents as a $200 billion opportunity. This represents the next major revenue driver for Nvidia.

cards.title: Anthropic Projects Profitability This Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic told investors it will more than double revenue to $10.9 billion in Q2 2026. The company is on track for its first profitable quarter.

cards.title: Clouted Raises $7M for Viral Videos
cards.body: Video clipping startup Clouted closed a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures. The platform aims to remove guesswork from short-form video virality.

cards.title: xAI Lost $6.4B in 2025: Filing
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing revealed xAI burned $6.4 billion last year while planning massive expansion. The filing offers first public details on Elon Musk's AI finances.

cards.title: Nvidia Posts Record Quarter Results
cards.body: Nvidia announced record revenue and revealed $43 billion in startup holdings. However, the company forecasted slower growth in the next quarter.

cards.title: xAI Buying $2.8B in Gas Turbines
cards.body: xAI announced plans to purchase $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over three years. The investment supports massive data center expansion.

cards.title: Anthropic Pays xAI $1.25B Monthly
cards.body: Anthropic agreed to purchase compute from xAI at $1.25 billion per month. The deal represents a major partnership between the AI giants.

cards.title: OpenAI Solves 80-Year-Old Math Problem
cards.body: OpenAI's reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946. Leading mathematicians verified the breakthrough, backing the claim.

cards.title: IrisGo Launches AI Desktop Assistant
cards.body: Andrew Ng-backed IrisGo debuted an 'AI butler' that learns desktop tasks automatically. The startup positions itself as the AI productivity sidekick.

cards.title: OpenAI Accelerates September IPO Plans
cards.body: OpenAI resumed IPO preparations following Elon Musk's lawsuit dismissal. The company targets September for its public market debut.

cards.title: AI Search Startups Attract Major Interest
cards.body: AI search has quietly become one of consumer AI's most attractive opportunities. Multiple startups are competing in this rapidly growing segment.

cards.title: Stability AI Releases Audio Model 3.0
cards.body: Stability Audio 3.0 can generate six-minute songs with a small on-device model. The tool produces two-minute tracks and runs locally.

cards.title: Spotify Launches AI Audiobook Creation Tool
cards.body: Spotify is partnering with ElevenLabs to enable AI-powered audiobook creation. The feature will be available through new audiobook plans launching later this year.

cards.title: Spotify Adds AI Q&A and Briefing Features
cards.body: Spotify is integrating AI capabilities to generate custom daily or weekly podcast briefings. Users can prompt the system to create personalized content summaries.

cards.title: Spotify Challenges Google with NotebookLM Rival
cards.body: Spotify is launching a new desktop app as a research preview in 20+ markets. The app directly competes with Google's NotebookLM AI research tool.

cards.title: Hark Raises $700M for Universal AI Interface
cards.body: Hark plans to release multimodal AI models this summer powering a personal AI platform. The company will follow with custom hardware devices optimized for these systems.

cards.title: The Path Launches Safer AI Therapy Model
cards.body: Founded by Tony Robbins and Calm alumni, The Path scored 95 on mental health safety benchmark Vera-MH. This significantly outperforms consumer AI bots, which top out at 65.

cards.title: Google Pitches Confusing AI Agent Ecosystem
cards.body: Google's I/O conference unveiled AI agents as a new way for consumers to interact with the web. The introduction was promising but confusing in execution.

cards.title: AI Recycling Startups Target Critical Minerals
cards.body: Startups are using AI to improve recovery of critical minerals like aluminum from waste. Rising aluminum prices make AI-optimized recycling increasingly profitable.

cards.title: Jensen Huang Predicts $200B AI Agent CPU Market
cards.body: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang identified CPUs for AI agents as the next major revenue opportunity. He projects a $200 billion market for this new category.

cards.title: Anthropic Targets First Profitable Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic told investors it will more than double revenue to $10.9 billion in Q2. The AI company is on track for profitability.

cards.title: xAI Burned $6.4B in 2025, Expanding Grok
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion last year while planning massive expansion. Elon Musk's AI startup continues aggressive spending despite losses.

cards.title: xAI Purchases $2.8B in Natural Gas Turbines
cards.body: xAI committed to buying $2.8 billion of natural gas turbines over three years. The spending reflects massive infrastructure needs for AI model training.

cards.title: Anthropic Pays xAI $1.25B Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Anthropic signed a major deal to purchase computational resources from xAI. The monthly cost reaches $1.25 billion, revealing the scale of AI infrastructure investments.

cards.title: OpenAI's Reasoning Model Solves 80-Year Math Problem
cards.body: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946. Mathematicians who previously exposed OpenAI's errors are backing the new claim.

cards.title: Andrew Ng-Backed IrisGo Becomes AI Desktop Buddy
cards.body: IrisGo watches desktop activity and automatically learns to complete tasks for users. The AI 'butler' startup is developing into a practical desktop assistant.

cards.title: OpenAI IPO Expected in September
cards.body: OpenAI is reportedly preparing for an IPO following Elon Musk's failed lawsuit. The company could go public as soon as September.

cards.title: AI Search Startups Attract Major Investment
cards.body: AI search has become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI development. Multiple startups are competing in this rapidly growing space.

cards.title: Stability AI Releases New Audio Model
cards.body: Stability Audio 3.0 can generate 6-minute songs and runs on-device for 2-minute tracks. The model enables AI music creation without cloud processing.

cards.title: Anthropic Showcases AI Coding Future at Event
cards.body: Code with Claude, Anthropic's developer conference in London, highlighted AI-assisted software development. The event demonstrated practical applications of Claude for developers.

cards.title: Google Prepares Search Remake with Agentic AI
cards.body: Google plans to fundamentally restructure search using agentic AI in 2026. The shift represents a major evolution in how users will interact with search.

cards.title: Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI Over Structure
cards.body: Elon Musk's legal challenge to OpenAI's structure and leadership was unsuccessful. The loss clears the path for OpenAI's IPO plans.
